summary.problem: The normalized task graph preserves sheet-authored status values, so locally completed proof-backed tasks still appeared ready in generated task surfaces.
summary.repair: Added a generated status projector that reads the normalized graph plus append-only proof ledger and emits an effective status view without mutating source graph or sheet data.
summary.result: The status projection updates only status, proof_uri, and next_action fields in generated/task_graph.status.json and reports forbidden_update_count=0.

commands.cmd: env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/update-task-graph-status.py generated/task_graph.normalized.json --ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl -o generated/task_graph.status.json
commands.output: update-task-graph-status: wrote 11 task status entrie(s), 9 task(s) updated, next_ready_task_id=LPS-017

commands.cmd: jq '{result, task_count, ledger_entry_count, updated_task_ids, complete_task_ids, ready_task_ids, next_ready_task_id, forbidden_update_count}' generated/task_graph.status.json
commands.output_summary: result pass; 11 tasks; 10 ledger entries before LPS-017 proof merge; forbidden_update_count 0; next_ready_task_id LPS-017

commands.cmd: env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/merge-proof-records.py proof_records --ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl --report proof_records/proof_ledger.merge_report.json
commands.output: merge-proof-records: appended 1 entrie(s), skipped 9 existing entrie(s), ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl

commands.cmd: env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/update-task-graph-status.py generated/task_graph.normalized.json --ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl -o generated/task_graph.status.json
commands.output: update-task-graph-status: wrote 11 task status entrie(s), 10 task(s) updated, next_ready_task_id=LPS-018

commands.cmd: env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/merge-proof-records.py proof_records --ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl --report proof_records/proof_ledger.idempotency_report.json --dry-run
commands.output: merge-proof-records: would append 0 entrie(s), skipped 10 existing entrie(s), ledger proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl

commands.cmd: jq -e '[.tasks[].updated_fields[]? | select(. != "status" and . != "proof_uri" and . != "next_action")] | length == 0' generated/task_graph.status.json
